Have a question, need help, or want to chat with the community?

Please join our official **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/hWSdGrccBU)** for general discussion, support, and help with EaseMotion CSS! If you're encountering a bug or proposing a feature, please use the corresponding templates instead.
